title: Sir Frog skin for frogs
description: A classy frog in a top hat in your Minecraft world
body:
![A Minecraft frog in a top hat and a monocle looking into the sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb9b299d5b86d39dd3244ca1cafe39ea6be3a43.jpeg) ## ⚠️ [**FRESH ANIMATIONS**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) **SUPPORT COMMING SOON** Currently Fresh Animations pack overrides the frog model, so you can't use both of these packs at the same time. But I will add FA support shortly c: ## About Ever wanted a classy frog in a top had and a monocle in your Minecraft world? I know I do! Thats why I present to you this resource pack that can give you something you never knew you always wanted (a classy frogo) ## Overview ![A gif of a Minecraft frog in a top hat and a monocle looking into the camera](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7e76035e2cdd2d9436fdbee89081e261b6ad4f4.gif) Wow, cool frogs for real ## How To Use **This resorce pack requires the [ETF mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and the [EMF mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) to work**
In order to get these textures applied you need to rename a frog to `Sir Frog` > **⚠️IMPORTANT⚠️**
> The names **are case-sensitive**. Please make sure you name frogs as listed above!
